caption: A man with a shaved head and a dark beard is seated in a recording studio, positioned in front of a grey acoustic foam wall. He wears black over-ear headphones and a white t-shirt featuring a small, stylized black logo on the chest that reads "Stay Galactic". A professional silver microphone attached to a boom arm is positioned directly in front of him. As the sequence progresses, the man speaks, his mouth opening and closing to form words. He maintains a focused gaze slightly off-camera to the left, with his facial expression shifting slightly as he talks. The camera angle remains static, capturing him from the chest up, while his right arm, which features a visible tattoo, rests out of full view. No other people are present in the scene.
